languages.text: "Неужели так сложно сказать то, что Тервантьяс хочет услышать?"
"Is it really so hard to just say what Tervantias wants to hear?"
languages.original_text: "Неужели так сложно сказать то, что Тервантьяс хочет услышать?"

traits.locale_text: "Is it that hard to say what Tervantias wants to hear?"
"Is it that hard to say what Tervantias wants to hear?"
"Is it really so hard to just say what Tervantias wants to hear?"
"Is it really so hard to just say what Tervantias wants to hear?"
"Is it really so hard to just say what Tervantias wants to hear?"
"Is it really so hard to just say what Tervantias wants to hear?"

languages.text: "Ist es wirklich so schwer, zu sagen, was Tervantias hören will?"
languages.original_text: "Is it really so hard to just say what Tervantias wants to hear?"

traits.locale_text: "Ist es wirklich so schwer, zu sagen, was Tervantias hören will?"

languages.text: « Vous ne pouvez vraiment pas vous contenter de prononcer les mots que Tervantias veut entendre ? »
languages.original_text: "Is it really so hard to just say what Tervantias wants to hear?"

traits.locale_text: « Vous ne pouvez vraiment pas vous contenter de prononcer les mots que Tervantias veut entendre ? »

languages.text: «¿Tan difícil es decir lo que Tervantias quiere oír?».
languages.original_text: "Is it really so hard to just say what Tervantias wants to hear?"

traits.locale_text: «¿Tan difícil es decir lo que Tervantias quiere oír?».

languages.text: "Tervantias'ın duymak istediği şeyi söylemek gerçekten bu kadar zor mu?"
languages.original_text: "Is it really so hard to just say what Tervantias wants to hear?"

traits.locale_text: "Tervantias'ın duymak istediği şeyi söylemek gerçekten bu kadar zor mu?"

languages.text: “说几句特万提亚斯想听的话，真有那么难吗？”
languages.original_text: "Is it really so hard to just say what Tervantias wants to hear?"

traits.locale_text: “说几句特万提亚斯想听的话，真有那么难吗？”

languages.text: 「テルヴァンティアスの聞きたい言葉を口にするだけのことが、そんなに難しいのか？」
languages.original_text: "Is it really so hard to just say what Tervantias wants to hear?"

traits.locale_text: 「テルヴァンティアスの聞きたい言葉を口にするだけのことが、そんなに難しいのか？」
